alert-tone-matrix.title: Semantic tones for inline feedback
alert-tone-matrix.description: The base matrix captures the key alert-tone states so the component page immediately shows the visual range of `info/success/warning/danger/slate/azure`.

alert-closable-flow.title: Closable alert with host-level state
alert-closable-flow.description: We show separately that `GrAlert` does not hide on its own: the parent screen receives `close` and decides when to bring the banner back.

alert-custom-colors.title: Brand-specific colors without layout overrides
alert-custom-colors.description: This scenario is for dashboard teams that need to adapt the alert to a domain brand while keeping the component's icon/layout API.

closable.title: Maintenance window
closable.message: Payments will be processed in read-only mode from 02:00 to 02:30 UTC.
closable.dismissed: Alert dismissed. Bring it back from the side panel.
closable.eventDescription: `close` is emitted so the host screen can hide or persist the banner state.

customColors.brandMessage: Teams often override colors to align alerts with domain-specific dashboards or tenant branding.
customColors.mutedMessage: The component still keeps the same layout, icon slotting and close mechanics while colors are fully customized.

variants.infoMessage: Deploy preview URL is ready for the QA handoff.
variants.successMessage: Billing sync finished and no manual retries are required.
variants.warningMessage: API quota is at 78%; consider moving heavy jobs to the night window.
variants.dangerMessage: Background worker lost connection to Redis and needs operator attention.
variants.slateMessage: Runbook is archived and kept for passive operator context.
variants.azureMessage: Release note references are ready for stakeholder review.
